\section*{NAME}
codata\_constant\_type - data type defining a constant

\section*{SYNOPSIS}
{\ttfamily
type(codata\_constant\_type) :: c

struct codata\_constant\_type c;

}
\section*{DESCRIPTION}
Defines a constant with the name, the value, the uncertainty and the unit.

\section*{SEE ALSO}
codata(3)
